overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit Night City at night. The journey progresses from an elevated walkway with glass barriers through dark underpasses and tunnels beneath massive overpasses, showcasing the game's atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and vibrant holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated walkway with glass barriers, viewing the neon-lit cityscape through the heavy rain

entered.detail: transparent glass panels with metal railings lining the edge of the elevated walkway
tall building-mounted billboard displaying large yellow number 16 and purple graphics
vertical neon sign for DATA INC corporation
vertical neon sign for Fujisaki corporation below DATA INC
vertical neon sign for softsys corporation at street level
tall street lamp emitting bright white light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated walkway lined with glass safety barriers. Bright neon corporate signage for DATA INC, Fujisaki, and softsys illuminates the right side of the frame, while street lamps pierce through the heavy rainfall. The camera moves steadily forward through the cyberpunk cityscape with no other pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass approaching city center

events.description: transitioning from open elevated walkway to covered underpass beneath highway structure
ambient lighting shifts from bright neon to dim artificial as entering the underpass shadow

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the darker underpass area beneath the highway, passing under the City Center direction sign

entered.detail: overhead directional sign with white text reading CITY CENTER and arrows
massive cylindrical concrete pillar supporting the highway above
underside of the elevated highway structure creating a roof over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a darker, more enclosed underpass beneath the highway structure. The City Center sign hangs overhead as the lighting shifts from vibrant neon to dim, artificial illumination. Concrete support pillars line the path while the glass barriers and bright corporate signage of the previous area disappear from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete tunnel with large holographic billboard arch

events.description: exiting the tunnel into a larger underpass area with visible staircases and ramps

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark tunnel toward the illuminated archway, descending slightly into the underpass system

entered.detail: large arched tunnel entrance with green structural framing
massive curved billboard displaying 3mouths 1 desire advertisement with red and pink imagery
flight of concrete stairs leading upward to the left
small illuminated kiosk or vending machine on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment progresses through a dark, enclosed tunnel dominated by a massive holographic billboard arch displaying 3mouths 1 desire. The environment is dimly lit with concrete stairs visible to the left and a small kiosk to the right. The camera moves steadily forward, descending slightly as it approaches the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass beneath highway with billboards and pedestrian traffic

events.description: pedestrians become visible walking through the underpass ahead, first human presence in the clip

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass beneath the highway, passing other pedestrians and illuminated wall advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead in the same direction under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling of the highway overpass creating a cavernous space
series of illuminated advertisements mounted on the concrete wall including vehicle ads
scattered trash bags and debris accumulated on the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider underpass beneath the massive highway overpass, where pedestrians are now visible walking through the space. Wall-mounted billboards illuminate the left side while trash debris litters the right. The environment feels more lived-in and urban, with the camera continuing forward through the sheltered concrete corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, rain-slicked elevated walkway into the dim, gritty depths of a concrete urban underpass. It begins moving steadily forward past glass safety barriers and vibrant neon corporate signage for DATA INC and Fujisaki, with street lamps piercing through heavy rainfall. As the camera advances, the scene transitions into a darker, enclosed underpass where the vibrant neon fades into dim artificial light beneath a City Center sign and heavy concrete pillars. The path then leads through a dark tunnel dominated by a massive holographic billboard arch before descending slightly past a small kiosk and concrete stairs. Finally, the environment opens into a wider, lived-in corridor beneath a massive highway overpass, where wall-mounted billboards illuminate a space filled with pedestrians and scattered urban debris.
